title: PNB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 30 Specialist Officer Posts
description: The Punjab National Bank (PNB) has officially announced the Specialist Officer (Engineer) Recruitment 2026 with 30 openings. Those candidates who have completed their B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering can use this opportunity and apply for these posts. Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for the PNB Recruitment 2026 . If you are looking for more, here is a l...
